name: Bean Stew (Santa Maria)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a pot over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and cook for 2 minutes until softened.
3. Stir in the garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Add the trimmed and sliced runner beans, chopped tomatoes, sugar, salt, black pepper, and basil to the pot.
5. Mix everything together well.
6. Cook the mixture over medium heat for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Pour in the stock and stir gently.
8. Simmer until the beans are tender, which may take around 30-40 minutes depending on the desired tenderness.
9. Serve hot or cold.
